text:
Royal Government arc is the eighth story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

The situation inside the Walls becomes critical after the murder of Pastor Nick and a subsequent attempt to kidnap Eren Jaeger and Historia Reiss. Knowing that the monarchy's actions greatly endanger humankind, Erwin Smith begins his plan - the plan to overthrow the government and make Historia the new queen.
